fields_changed.what: AI/BI Genie now Generally Available on all clouds; adds Genie Deep Research (multi-step research plans), Genie Code GA, and a Managed MCP Server (beta) letting any agent ask natural-language data questions across Genie Spaces + Unity Catalog.
fields_changed.notes: Conversational/agentic analytics bounded to the Lakehouse; MCP server opens NL data access to external agents.

change_summary: AI/BI Genie reached GA on all clouds and added agentic access (Deep Research + Managed MCP Server) at DAIS 2026.
